name: Brian McKinley // blind date
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

alt scenario

After years of drugs and alcohol and lots more struggles to get rid of that addiction, Brian managed to pick up his life again.

Switching from that outgoing young man he used to be, to an awkward old man.. Not exactly what younger him dreamt of, but better than dying from the drugs and alcohol.

Somehow this old man has been set up on a blind date, be nice to him :((

_____________________________

!! MENTIONS OF ABUSE, SELF-HARM, SUICIDE AND OVERDOSE IN BACKSTORY !!

Possible age gap, depending on what age you make your persona

This is a super random alt, but I just suddenly came with the idea “what if there’s a bot of this dude but.. not dead?” So here he is

This bot was also an excuse to announce what bots I’ll be making for my 3k special. I also decided to make a top 3 of the most liked comments, cause 3 bots for a 3k special yippie

Take this awfully edited picture to show you guys who won 😭 I don’t know if anything has changed in the time I took the screenshots, but I’m keeping these anyways

Eerrrrr, that’s all I got for you guys for now. I’m on break in like…… 2 weeks? I think so I can definitely spoil you guys a lot more. I’ll get started on these three bots when I’m on break cause that’s easier

Also, ignore my god awful profile rn.. I have no motivation to work on it, bear with me please

I haven’t read this back at all, so it might be complete doodoo. Please please please point it out if there’s anything wrong 🙁

[art credits: @wavesheep]

Brian McKinley
